name: Ballistic Smite

time.condition: which you take immediately after hitting a creature with a Ranged weapon

entries: Choose Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder damage. The target hit by the attack takes an extra {@damage 2d6} damage of the chosen type. The triggering attack can deal the chosen damage type or its normal damage type (your choice).

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@dice 1d6} for each spell slot level above 1.
